info.title: wcg
info.description: Fast wildcard grep tool. Glob files with ** support, search content with wildcard patterns, colored output.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Fast wildcard grep tool — glob files, search content with wildcard patterns.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: -x
options.description: Exclude lines matching pattern (repeatable)

options.name: -X
options.description: Exclude files matching glob (repeatable)

options.name: -i
options.description: Case-insensitive content matching [default: False]

options.name: -l
options.description: Only print file paths that contain matches [default: False]

options.name: --no-ignore
options.description: Don't respect .gitignore files [default: False]

options.name: -L
options.description: Follow symbolic links [default: False]

options.name: -w
options.description: Watch for changes after initial scan [default: False]

options.name: -A
options.description: Show N lines after each match

options.name: -B
options.description: Show N lines before each match

options.name: -C
options.description: Show N lines before and after each match

options.name: -r
options.description: Replace matched content with this string (dry-run by default)

options.name: --write
options.description: Write replacements to files (default: dry-run preview) [default: False]

options.name: -c
options.description: Show count of matching lines per file instead of line content [default: False]

options.name: --tree
options.description: Render file listing as an indented ASCII tree (only in file-list mode, no content patterns) [default: False]

options.name: --depth
options.description: Maximum directory depth for tree output (default: 5)

options.name: --all
options.description: AND mode: all content patterns must match in a file (default: OR mode) [default: False]

options.name: --max-files
options.description: Maximum number of files to show in output

options.name: --max-matches
options.description: Maximum number of matches to show per file

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: Content search pattern(s) — multiple patterns are OR'd (e.g. ERROR WARN). Plain words match as substrings; use wildcards for prefix/suffix/full patterns (e.g. "ERROR*", "*.log").
